name: deco-admin-airtable-sync
description: Triggers the deco.cx admin Airtable sync action for a given table.

metadata.short_description: Triggers the deco.cx admin Airtable sync action.
metadata.mesh_description: This MCP provides a single tool to trigger the deco.cx admin Airtable sync action for a specific table. It allows AI agents to kick off data synchronization jobs between Airtable and the deco.cx platform, with support for dry-run mode and workflow orchestration.
